title: Rotten Flesh to Leather
description: Adds a few simple, vanilla style ways to get rid of spare rotten flesh.
body:
# Rotten Flesh to Leather
Adds a few simple, vanilla style ways to get rid of spare rotten flesh.

This currently includes:
- Smoking rotten flesh to receive leather
- Smelting rotten flesh to receive brown dye

This datapack is meant to be clean and simple, only adding the required recipes. It should be compatible with anything you like.
_____
![Rotten flesh being smoked into leather](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8kLBMwES/images/53e47b0de8aaf2ea992de8407f3bf5fbe154b685.png)
______
![Rotten flesh being smelted into brown dye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8kLBMwES/images/11e88a4a7d0b6e4c6d394bdcd225db7f1d8a1515.png)
_____
